Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.Assessments.Activity

Represents activity element in Student Plan.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Id

Element id.

 integer

None.
Title

Element title.

 string

None.
Url

The absolute URL to this activity.

 string

None.
IconUrl

Element icon.

 string

None.
Assessments

Assessments for the element.

 string

None.
